category_sources: source_facts.description says libqalculate is the library for Qalculate; official manual documents Qalculate calculator features, expressions, units, variables, and functions.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libqalculate; source_facts.homepage is the official Qalculate project site.
docs_sources: Official Qalculate manual is published at qalculate.github.io/manual and documents version 5.11.0.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Qalculate/libqalculate, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Qalculate library; source_facts.executables includes qalc; official manual documents units, functions, and calculator modes.
